description: Create sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql with proper foreign key constraints, logging triggers for Supabase queries, and any missing schema updates to support the relational hierarchy (Tournament -> Teams -> Players -> Matches -> Playing XI -> Contests).
steps: Create sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql with the following: (1) Add NOT NULL constraints where appropriate to enforce referential integrity - teams.tournament_id should be NOT NULL, players.team_id should be NOT NULL, matches.tournament_id/team_a_id/team_b_id should be NOT NULL, contests.match_id should be NOT NULL. Use ALTER TABLE statements. (2) Add CHECK constraints: matches team_a_id != team_b_id, contests entry_fee >= 0, contests prize_pool >= 0. (3) Add an audit_log table for logging Supabase queries with columns: id, table_name, operation (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), record_id, old_data JSONB, new_data JSONB, performed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. (4) Create trigger functions and triggers on teams, players, matches, contests tables that log INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE to the audit_log table. (5) Add indexes on foreign key columns for performance: teams(tournament_id), players(team_id), matches(tournament_id), matches(team_a_id), matches(team_b_id), contests(match_id). (6) Add a comment header explaining this file must be run after part4.
acceptance_criteria: sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql exists and contains valid PostgreSQL
File includes NOT NULL constraints on tournament_id, team_id, team_a_id, team_b_id, match_id
File includes CHECK constraint ensuring matches.team_a_id != matches.team_b_id
File includes trigger functions for logging
File includes indexes on FK columns
File has header comment explaining run order
verification: Run: test -f sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql && echo 'exists' - confirms file was created
Run: grep -c 'NOT NULL' sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql - should be >= 4
Run: grep -c 'CREATE INDEX' sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql - should be >= 5
findings: Created sql/part6-relational-integrity.sql with all required components. Verified: NOT NULL count=11, audit_log references=9, CREATE INDEX count=6, TRIGGER count=6. All acceptance criteria met. No build/test available (Flutter SDK not installed, SQL is runtime-only).
